constructors.name: GH_Document
constructors.summary: Constructor for GH_Document. Makes sure all important members are initialized.

methods.name: ActiveObjects
methods.summary: Returns all normal objects in the document that implement the IGH_ActiveObject interface

methods.name: AddObject
methods.signature: public bool AddObject(IGH_DocumentObject docObject, bool update, int index = 2147483647)
methods.summary: Add a new object to the document. If the object is already contained, nothing will happen

params.name: update
params.doc: If True, a new solution will be triggered afterwards, regardless of event response settings.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index at which object will be inserted.

methods.name: AlignObjects(GH_Align, GH_Distribute)
methods.signature: public void AlignObjects(GH_Align align, GH_Distribute distribute)
methods.summary: Perform alignment and distribution logic on all selected objects.

methods.name: AlignObjects(GH_Align, GH_Distribute, List<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.signature: public void AlignObjects(GH_Align align, GH_Distribute distribute, List<IGH_DocumentObject> objs)
methods.summary: Perform alignment and distribution logic on a set of objects.

methods.name: AppendToDebugLog
methods.summary: Useful for creating textual representations of this document for debugging purposes.

methods.name: ArrangeObject
methods.signature: public bool ArrangeObject(IGH_DocumentObject obj, GH_Arrange motion)
methods.summary: Rearrange the stack order of the object.

methods.name: ArrangeObjects
methods.summary: Rearrange the stack order of a collection of objects.

methods.name: AssociateWithRhinoDocument
methods.summary: Associate this GH_Document with the currently active Rhino document. This only works if both the 3dm and the ghx file have been saved at least once.

methods.name: AutoLayoutComponents
methods.summary: Perform automatic layout on this document.

params.name: limitToSelection
params.doc: If true, only selected objects will be considered.

methods.name: AutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger)
methods.summary: Creates a new autosave file on the disk. The previous autosave file (assuming it exists) will be temporarily renamed and eventually deleted entirely. Note: AutoSave is only possible on Documents that have TopLevel Rank and a valid FilePath.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for autosave. User can choose to ignore certain autosave reasons.

methods.name: AutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger, Guid)
methods.signature: public bool AutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger trigger, Guid id)
methods.summary: Creates a new autosave file on the disk. The previous autosave file (assuming it exists) will be temporarily renamed and eventually deleted entirely. Note: AutoSave is only possible on Documents that have TopLevel Rank and a valid FilePath.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for autosave. User can choose to ignore certain autosave reasons.

params.name: id
params.doc: Guid of autosave operation, consecutive calls to autosave with the same Guid will be ignored.

methods.name: AutoSaveFileName
methods.summary: Computes the autosave filename for a full grasshopper filepath.

params.name: filename
params.doc: Full path of Grasshopper file, including directories and extension.

returns.doc: The autosave filename (but not including the autosave directory).

methods.name: BoundingBox
methods.summary: Returns the boundingbox of all the normal attributes. If the document contains no normal attributes an Empty RectangleF structure is returned.

params.name: limitToSelection
params.doc: If true, only selected attributes are included in the boundingbox computation.

returns.doc: The boundingbox of the requested objects or RectangleF.Empty if no objects could be found.

methods.name: BringSelectionToTop
methods.summary: Move the selection set to the top of the visible stack

methods.name: ClearIgnoreList
methods.summary: Clears the Object Exception Ignore List.

methods.name: ClearReferenceTable
methods.summary: Destroys the Referenced object table in the Rhino event watcher. You must call this function if you either add or remove a reference to a Rhino object.

methods.name: CloseAllSubsidiaries
methods.summary: Iterate over all subsidiary documents and close them all without saving.

returns.doc: The number of subsidiary documents that was closed.

methods.name: ClusterInputHooks
methods.summary: Gets a sorted list of all the cluster input hooks.

returns.doc: A list of hooks in the proper order (from top to bottom, left to right).

methods.name: ClusterInstanceCount
methods.summary: Counts the number of instances of a specific cluster document ID.

params.name: id
params.doc: The cluster document id to search for.

returns.doc: The number of instances of a specific cluster.

methods.name: ClusterOutputHooks
methods.summary: Gets a sorted list of all the cluster output hooks.

returns.doc: A list of hooks in the proper order (from top to bottom, left to right).

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compare two documents. This function does not compare document content.

returns.doc: Comparison key.

methods.name: ConstructDocumentTree
methods.summary: Create a hierarchical document tree of ownership with this document as the root.

returns.doc: A tree of all documents owned directly or indirectly by this document.

methods.name: ContainsClusterHooks
methods.summary: Tests whether this document contains at least one cluster hook.

methods.name: ConvertFullNamesToNickNames
methods.summary: Convert all nicknames to original nicknames if they are equal to the default full name. There will be no undo record associated with this operation.

methods.name: ConvertNickNamesToFullNames
methods.summary: Convert all nicknames to full names, if they are equal to the default nickname. There will be no undo record associated with this operation.

methods.name: CreateAutomaticClusterHooks
methods.summary: Add an input hook for every non-optional input parameter with no persistent data and no sources. Then add an output hook for every floating parameter without recipients, and for every first component output parameter where the parent component has no recipients.

methods.name: CreateConnectivityDiagram
methods.summary: Gets the connectivity diagram for the current state of this document.

returns.doc: The connectivity diagram of the current state. Once objects/wires are added or removed the diagram will not update and you must request a new one.

methods.name: CreateExpressionParser
methods.summary: Create a new Expression Solver preloaded with the constants defined in this document.

methods.name: DefineConstant
methods.signature: public void DefineConstant(string name, GH_Variant value)
methods.summary: Add a new constant to the document. Constants are not case-sensitive, when you define a constant with an existing name, the old one will be replaced. Note: constants are as of yet unused. Eventually they are supposed to become accessible to all expressions running inside a document.

methods.name: DeselectAll
methods.summary: Deselect all top-level attributes.

methods.name: DestroyAttributeCache
methods.summary: Destroys the Attribute cache. Call this function whenever you do something which might affect attributes.

methods.name: DestroyAutoSaveFiles
methods.summary: Destroys all autosave files and backup files that are associated with this document. Only call this function when you are certain that the document has been properly saved and no changes have occured since.

methods.name: DestroyObjectTable
methods.summary: Erase the Object fast lookup table. You must call this whenever you add or remove objects to or from the document while circumventing the regular channels.

methods.name: DestroyPreviewCaches
methods.summary: Wipe all caches for Viewport Preview logic.

methods.name: DestroyPreviewMeshes
methods.summary: Attempts to destroy all the preview meshes in this document. It might not work for all objects, but this is still your best bet.

methods.name: DestroyProxySources
methods.summary: Remove all remaining proxy sources from the document.

methods.name: DisabledObjects
methods.summary: Returns all disabled objects in the document

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: When you discard documents you must call Dispose or the Viewport Display event handlers will not be disconnected.

methods.name: DuplicateDocument
methods.summary: Attempt to duplicate a document.

returns.doc: A document similar to the input on success, or nothing on failure.

methods.name: EnabledObjects
methods.summary: Returns all enabled objects in the document

methods.name: ExpandSelection
methods.signature: public void ExpandSelection(bool Upstream = true, bool Downstream = true, bool GrowSelection = true)
methods.summary: Grow or shift the selection set based on source and recipient links

params.name: Upstream
params.doc: If True, the selection will grow/shift upstream

params.name: Downstream
params.doc: If True, the selection will grow/shift downstream

params.name: GrowSelection
params.doc: If True, the current selection set is retained. If False, the current selection set is discarded

methods.name: ExpirePreview
methods.summary: Expires the preview caches of the conduit.

methods.name: ExpireSolution
methods.summary: Expire the entire solution. This will blank all objects.

methods.name: FilterActive
methods.summary: Filter a list of objects.

returns.doc: A list containing only the objects that implement the IGH_ActiveObject interface

methods.name: FilterDisabled
methods.summary: Filter a list of objects.

returns.doc: A list containing only the disabled objects

methods.name: FilterEnabled
methods.summary: Filter a list of objects.

returns.doc: A list containing only the enabled objects

methods.name: FilterInactive
methods.summary: Filter a list of objects.

returns.doc: A list containing only the objects that don't implement the IGH_ActiveObject interface

methods.name: FilterObjects(GH_Filter, GH_Filter, GH_Filter)
methods.signature: public List<IGH_DocumentObject> FilterObjects(GH_Filter selectedObjects = GH_Filter.DontCare, GH_Filter enabledObjects = GH_Filter.DontCare, GH_Filter activeObjects = GH_Filter.DontCare)
methods.summary: Returns all objects in the document that pass the filter specification

methods.name: FilterObjects(List<IGH_DocumentObject>, GH_Filter, GH_Filter, GH_Filter)
methods.signature: public static List<IGH_DocumentObject> FilterObjects(List<IGH_DocumentObject> in, GH_Filter bSelectedObjects = GH_Filter.DontCare, GH_Filter bEnabledObjects = GH_Filter.DontCare, GH_Filter bActiveObjects = GH_Filter.DontCare)
methods.summary: Filter a list of objects using several filters at once

returns.doc: A list with all objects that pass all filters

methods.name: FilterSelected
methods.summary: Filter a list of objects.

returns.doc: A list containing only the selected objects

methods.name: FilterUnselected
methods.summary: Filter a list of objects.

returns.doc: A list containing only the unselected objects

methods.name: FindAllDownstreamObjects(IGH_ActiveObject)
methods.summary: Find all objects that depend in some way on the Source.

methods.name: FindAllDownstreamObjects(List<IGH_ActiveObject>)
methods.summary: Find all objects that depend in some way on the Source collection

methods.name: FindAllDownstreamObjects(IGH_ActiveObject, GH_Document.GH_ActiveObjectFilter)
methods.signature: public List<IGH_ActiveObject> FindAllDownstreamObjects(IGH_ActiveObject from, GH_Document.GH_ActiveObjectFilter filter)
methods.summary: Find all objects that depend in some way on the Source.

methods.name: FindAllDownstreamObjects(List<IGH_ActiveObject>, GH_Document.GH_ActiveObjectFilter)
methods.summary: Find all objects that depend in some way on the Source collection

methods.name: FindAttribute(Guid)
methods.summary: Find the object that matches the ID

methods.name: FindAttribute(PointF, Boolean)
methods.signature: public IGH_Attributes FindAttribute(PointF pt, bool topLevelOnly)
methods.summary: Search for attributes that contain a certain point.

params.name: topLevelOnly
params.doc: If true, child attributes will be skipped.

methods.name: FindAttributeByGrip(PointF, Boolean, Int32)
methods.signature: public IGH_Attributes FindAttributeByGrip(PointF pt, bool bLimitToOutside, int SearchRadius = 12)
methods.summary: Search for attributes that contain grips near the search locus

params.name: bLimitToOutside
params.doc: If true, grips are ignored if the pt is on the 'inside' side.

methods.name: FindAttributeByGrip(PointF, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Int32)
methods.signature: public IGH_Attributes FindAttributeByGrip(PointF pt, bool bLimitToOutside, bool bIncludeInputs, bool bIncludeOutputs, int SearchRadius = 12)
methods.summary: Search for attributes that contain grips near the search locus

params.name: bLimitToOutside
params.doc: If true, grips are ignored if the pt is on the 'inside' side.

methods.name: FindClusters(Guid)
methods.summary: Find all the clusters that have a matching ID.

returns.doc: A list of all the clusters that match the ID.

methods.name: FindClusters(String)
methods.summary: Find all the clusters that have a matching filepath.

returns.doc: A list of all the clusters that match the filepath.

methods.name: FindComponent(Point)
methods.summary: Search for components that contain the locus

methods.name: FindComponent(Guid)
methods.summary: Search for components using an ID filter

returns.doc: The component with the ID, or Null if no component could be found

methods.name: FindFloatingParameter
methods.summary: Search for floating parameters that contain the locus

methods.name: FindInputParameter
methods.summary: Search for input (upstream) parameters that contain the locus

methods.name: FindObject(PointF, Single)
methods.signature: public IGH_DocumentObject FindObject(PointF pt, float radius)
methods.summary: Find the topmost object that is closest to the point

methods.name: FindObject(Guid, Boolean)
methods.signature: public IGH_DocumentObject FindObject(Guid id, bool topLevelOnly)
methods.summary: Find the object that matches the ID.

params.name: topLevelOnly
params.doc: If True, only top-level objects are included. If False, the entire object attribute tree is recursed

methods.name: FindObject<T>(Guid, Boolean)
methods.signature: public T FindObject<T>(Guid id, bool topLevelOnly) where T : IGH_DocumentObject
methods.summary: Find the object that matches the ID.

params.name: topLevelOnly
params.doc: If True, only top-level objects are included. If False, the entire object attribute tree is recursed

methods.name: FindObjects
methods.signature: public List<IGH_DocumentObject> FindObjects(List<string> keys, int maxCount)
methods.summary: Find the objects in the document that match the search term. Top level object names and nicknames are searched, as well as descriptions. Some objects are special cased to allow for more targeted searches. Data descriptions are not searched.

methods.name: FindOutputParameter
methods.summary: Search for output (downstream) parameters that contain the locus

methods.name: FindParameter
methods.summary: Search for parameters using an ID filter

returns.doc: The parameter with the ID, or Null if no parameter could be found

methods.name: FindWireAt
methods.signature: public bool FindWireAt(PointF point, float radius, ref IGH_Param source, ref IGH_Param target)
methods.summary: Find the wire at or near the given coordinate.

returns.doc: True if a wire was found.

methods.name: ForcePreview
methods.summary: If true, the document will draw viewport previews regardless of other conditions. Typically a document only previews if it is loaded in the canvas or when it has an RCP.

methods.name: GetAllInstanceIDs
methods.summary: Get a sorted list of all the IGH_DocumentObject instance IDs in this document.

params.name: topLevelOnly
params.doc: If true, only top level objects are considered.

returns.doc: A sorted fictionary of IDs and Integers. The integers represent the indices of the top-level objects that contained the ids. Since the object list inside a GH_Document is not static, these indices will not remain valid.

methods.name: InactiveObjects
methods.summary: Returns all objects in the document that don't implement the IGH_ActiveObject interface

methods.name: InvertSelection
methods.summary: Invert the selected state of all top-level attributes.

methods.name: IsEscapeKeyDown
methods.summary: Gets whether the escape key was pressed since the last time this function was called. Though in reality the actual escape state is checked no more than once every 50 milliseconds or so, which should be sufficient for a smooth user experience.
methods.remarks: If GetAsyncKeyState is called by some other application, it will mess with the value returned here, as GetAsyncKeyState is a system wide static method.

returns.doc: True if escape was/is pressed, false if otherwise.

methods.name: IsRenderMeshPipelineViewport
methods.summary: Test to see whether a pipeline should have custom render meshes vs. previews.

returns.doc: True if custom meshes ought to be used rather than previews.

methods.name: MergeDocument(GH_Document)
methods.summary: Hoist all objects from another document into this one.
methods.remarks: The objects will be moved, not copied. The other document ends up being empty since objects can only belong to one document at a time.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other document. Cannot be Null or

methods.name: MergeDocument(GH_Document, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool MergeDocument(GH_Document other, bool resolveProxies)
methods.summary: Hoist all objects from another document into this one.
methods.remarks: The objects will be moved, not copied. The other document ends up being empty since objects can only belong to one document at a time.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other document. Cannot be Null or

params.name: resolveProxies
params.doc: If True, an attempt is made to repair proxy sources after insertion.

methods.name: MergeDocument(GH_Document, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool MergeDocument(GH_Document other, bool resolveProxies, bool removeProxies)
methods.summary: Hoist all objects from another document into this one.
methods.remarks: The objects will be moved, not copied. The other document ends up being empty since objects can only belong to one document at a time.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other document. Cannot be null.

params.name: resolveProxies
params.doc: If True, an attempt is made to repair proxy sources after insertion.

params.name: removeProxies
params.doc: If True, all remaining proxies will be deleted.

methods.name: Modified
methods.summary: Sets the modified flag of this document.

methods.name: MutateAllIds
methods.summary: Change all the instance UUIDs of all objects in the document. Be sure to resolve all proxy sources before mutating IDs. This function will ensure all groups are updated appropriately.

methods.name: NewSolution(Boolean)
methods.summary: Start a new solution.

params.name: expireAllObjects
params.doc: If True, all objects will be recalculated. If False, only already expired objects will be recalculated.

methods.name: NewSolution(Boolean, GH_SolutionMode)
methods.signature: public void NewSolution(bool expireAllObjects, GH_SolutionMode mode)
methods.summary: Start a new solution.

params.name: expireAllObjects
params.doc: If True, all objects will be recalculated. If False, only already expired objects will be recalculated.

params.name: mode
params.doc: Solution mode. Only use CommandLine or Silent if your solution runs in the background.

methods.name: NonBlankFilter
methods.summary: This delegate can be used in the FindAllDownstreamObjects(...) methods. Only includes objects that are non-blank and non-failed.

methods.name: NullFilter
methods.summary: This delegate can be used in the FindAllDownstreamObjects(...) methods. Includes all objects.

methods.name: OnContextChanged
methods.summary: Raise the ContextChanged event.

methods.name: OnEnabledChanged
methods.summary: Raise the EnabledChanged event.

methods.name: OnFilePathChanged
methods.signature: public void OnFilePathChanged(string old, string new)
methods.summary: Raise the FilePathChanged event.

methods.name: OnModifiedChanged
methods.summary: Raise the ModifiedChanged event

methods.name: OnObjectAdded
methods.summary: Raise the ObjectsAdded event.

methods.name: OnObjectDeleted
methods.summary: Raise the ObjectsDeleted event.

methods.name: OnObjectsAdded
methods.summary: Raise the ObjectsAdded event.

methods.name: OnObjectsDeleted
methods.summary: Raise the ObjectsDeleted event.

methods.name: OnSettingsChanged
methods.summary: Raise the SettingsChanged event.

methods.name: OnUndoStateChanged
methods.signature: public void OnUndoStateChanged(GH_UndoOperation op, GH_UndoRecord rec)
methods.summary: Raise the UndoStateChanged event.

params.name: op
params.doc: Type of undo operation to provide with the Event arguments.

params.name: rec
params.doc: Record to provide in the Event arguments.

methods.name: PreviewCurrentMeshParameters
methods.summary: Gets the currently relevant meshing parameters (do not modify the instance as it may be shared).

methods.name: Read
methods.summary: Standard archiving function. Will deserialize the entire document.

methods.name: Redo
methods.summary: Perform the first redo event.

returns.doc: True on success, false on no redo event or invalid redo event.

methods.name: RelevantObjectAtPoint(PointF)
methods.summary: Find the most relevant object at a given canvas location. The most relevant object might be a regular Object (Component or Parameter), it might be an attribute grip, an attribute balloon, a wire or a group.

returns.doc: Information about the most relevant object or Null if no relevant object could be found at the given point.

methods.name: RelevantObjectAtPoint(PointF, GH_RelevantObjectFilter)
methods.signature: public GH_RelevantObjectData RelevantObjectAtPoint(PointF pt, GH_RelevantObjectFilter searchFilter)
methods.summary: Find the most relevant object at a given canvas location. The most relevant object might be a regular Object (Component or Parameter), it might be an attribute grip, an attribute balloon, a wire or a group.

returns.doc: Information about the most relevant object or Null if no relevant object could be found at the given point.

methods.name: RemoveObject(IGH_Attributes, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool RemoveObject(IGH_Attributes attribute, bool update)
methods.summary: Remove the top-level object in the attribute tree from the document. This method does not add an Undo event, that is the responsibility of the caller.

methods.name: RemoveObject(IGH_DocumentObject, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool RemoveObject(IGH_DocumentObject docObject, bool update)
methods.summary: Remove the object from the document. This removal is the precursor to object deletion. Do not call this function if you intend to transfer the object to another GH_Document. This method does not add an Undo event, that is the responsibility of the caller.

methods.name: RemoveObjects
methods.summary: Remove the specified objects from the document. This removal is the precursor to object deletion. Do not call this function if you intend to transfer the objects to another GH_Document. This method does not add an Undo event, that is the responsibility of the caller.

params.name: objectList
params.doc: Objects to remove from this document.

params.name: update
params.doc: If True, the solution will be recomputed.

returns.doc: The number of objects actually deleted.

methods.name: RemoveSelection
methods.summary: Delete all the objects in the selection set. This method does not record an Undo event, that is the responsibility of the caller.

params.name: update
params.doc: If True, the solution will be recomputed.

methods.name: RepairProxySources
methods.summary: Attempts to resolve all proxy sources in the document.

returns.doc: False if one or more proxies could not be resolved

methods.name: ReplaceProxySources
methods.summary: Replace all remaining proxy sources in the document with UnresolvedProxy Objects.

methods.name: RequestAbortSolution
methods.summary: Set the requestabort flag. The solution will be aborted whenever the current active object is completed. It is also possible that active objects themselves implement an abortion mechanism, in which case abortion might occur even sooner.

methods.name: RunningAsCommand
methods.summary: When the document is being solved inside the context of an executing Rhino command, this function will return the command instance. Under normal operation of Grasshopper in the traditional sense, this function will return null. The document executes as a command when inside of the grasshopper player or as a compiled grasshopper player based command. The way to run a GH_Document as a command is to call the GH_RhinoScriptInterface.RunAsCommand function

returns.doc: executing command when running as a command; otherwise null

methods.name: ScheduleSolution(Int32)
methods.summary: Schedule a new solution after a specified time interval. The schedule is erased if another solution is triggered before the schedule is executed. Tight schedules override loose schedules. If this method is called during a solution, the schedule will be started after the current solution completes.

params.name: delay
params.doc: The delay (in milliseconds) between the completion of this solution and the start of the scheduled solution. If the delay is 1ms or more, a timer will be used to trigger a new solution sometime in the future. If a delay of 0ms is used, then the next solution will run recursively within the current solution. You should not use a delay of zero milliseconds too often as it will cause the Rhino process to run out of stack-space. The SolutionDepth property can be used to see how deeply recursive the solution currently is.

methods.name: ScheduleSolution(Int32, GH_Document.GH_ScheduleDelegate)
methods.signature: public void ScheduleSolution(int delay, GH_Document.GH_ScheduleDelegate callback)
methods.summary: Schedule a new solution after a specified time interval. The schedule is erased if another solution is triggered before the schedule is executed. Tight schedules override loose schedules. If this method is called during a solution, the schedule will be started after the current solution completes.

params.name: delay
params.doc: The delay (in milliseconds) between the completion of this solution and the start of the scheduled solution. If the delay is 1ms or more, a timer will be used to trigger a new solution sometime in the future. If a delay of 0ms is used, then the next solution will run recursively within the current solution. You should not use a delay of zero milliseconds too often as it will cause the Rhino process to run out of stack-space. The SolutionDepth property can be used to see how deeply recursive the solution currently is.

params.name: callback
params.doc: If not null, the callback will be called before the scheduled solution is triggered.

methods.name: Select(GH_RelevantObjectData)
methods.summary: Default pick selection behaviour. (looks at current Shift + Control modifier states to determine addition/removal)

params.name: obj_dat
params.doc: Information regarding the object to be selected.

methods.name: Select(GH_RelevantObjectData, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public GH_SelectionState Select(GH_RelevantObjectData obj_dat, bool bAdd, bool bRemove)
methods.summary: Default pick selection behaviour

params.name: obj_dat
params.doc: Information regarding the object to be selected.

params.name: bAdd
params.doc: If True, it will add the topmost unselected object that contains pt to the selection set. If False, the selection set will be cleared when an unselected object is picked

params.name: bRemove
params.doc: If True, it will remove the topmost selected object that contains pt from the selection set.

methods.name: SelectAll
methods.summary: Select all top-level attributes.

methods.name: SelectedObjects
methods.summary: Returns all selected objects in the document

methods.name: SetEnabledFlags(Boolean)
methods.summary: Set the enabled flags of all selected objects to true or false

methods.name: SetEnabledFlags(List<IGH_DocumentObject>, Boolean)
methods.signature: public void SetEnabledFlags(List<IGH_DocumentObject> objects, bool bEnable)
methods.summary: Set the enabled flags of all specified objects to true or false

methods.name: SetPreviewFlags(Boolean)
methods.summary: Set the preview flags of all selected objects to true or false

methods.name: SetPreviewFlags(List<IGH_DocumentObject>, Boolean)
methods.signature: public void SetPreviewFlags(List<IGH_DocumentObject> objects, bool bPreview)
methods.summary: Set the preview flags of all specified objects to true or false

methods.name: ShowPreviewSettings
methods.summary: Display the Preview settings dialog.

methods.name: SolutionProgress
methods.signature: public int SolutionProgress(out int objectIndex, out int maximumIndex)
methods.summary: Returns the progress of the current solution.

params.name: objectIndex
params.doc: The index of the object currently being solved.

returns.doc: Percentage of solution as a number between 1 and 99 inclusive.

methods.name: ToggleEnabledFlags()
methods.summary: Toggle the enabled flags of all selected objects

methods.name: ToggleEnabledFlags(List<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.summary: Toggle the enabled flags of all specified objects

methods.name: TogglePreviewFlags()
methods.summary: Toggle the preview flags of all selected objects

methods.name: TogglePreviewFlags(List<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.summary: Toggle the preview flags of all specified objects

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: A document serializes itself using the filename of the current path. This is useful for sorting purposes and ListBoxes.

methods.name: TranslateObjects
methods.signature: public void TranslateObjects(Size trXForm, bool bLimitToSelection)
methods.summary: Offset objects by a certain distance in X and Y

params.name: bLimitToSelection
params.doc: If True, only selected objects are affected

methods.name: Undo
methods.summary: Perform the first undo event.

returns.doc: True on success, false on no undo event or invalid undo event.

methods.name: UnselectedObjects
methods.summary: Returns all unselected objects in the document

methods.name: UpdateAllSubsidiaries
methods.summary: Iterate over all subsidiary documents and update them with their respective owners. If a subsidiary hasn't been modified, it will not be updated and it will not be counted.

returns.doc: The number of subsidiary documents updated.

methods.name: Write(GH_IWriter)
methods.summary: Standard archiving function. Will serialize the entire document.

methods.name: Write(GH_IWriter, IList<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.signature: public bool Write(GH_IWriter writer, IList<IGH_DocumentObject> objList)
methods.summary: Special function that allows writing of a custom object list. This function is used when partial documents need to be serialized such as when exporting or during clipboard operations.

properties.name: AbortRequested
properties.summary: Gets the abortrequested flag state.

properties.name: AttributeCount
properties.summary: Returns the total number of attributes in the document. Both Normal and Hidden ones

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Returns a list of all the attributes in this document. This includes attributes for nested objects such as input or output parameters.
properties.remarks: If the attribute cache is empty, it will be rebuild. Hence, this could be quite an expensive call to make.

properties.name: Author
properties.summary: Gets the author details associated with this document.

properties.name: ConstantServer
properties.summary: Gets the dictionary of constants defined in this document.

properties.name: ContainsCustomPreviewObjects
properties.summary: Gets whether this document contains *any* custom preview objects.

properties.name: ContainsCustomRenderObjects
properties.summary: Gets whether this document contains custom preview objects which are both ENABLED and included in RENDERING.

properties.name: Context
properties.summary: Gets or sets the context for this document. Note that the context is not a state so much as an action. Therefore it is not particularly useful to read the context after the fact, rather, context is mostly intended to be a setter, not a getter. When you set the context, all top-level document objects will be informed and the ContextChanged event will be raised.

properties.name: CustomRenderObjects
properties.summary: Enumerate over all enabled, rendering, non-empty custom preview objects.

properties.name: DefaultPreviewColour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the default preview colour for normal objects.

properties.name: DefaultSelectedPreviewColour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the default preview colour for normal objects.

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: Gets the display name for this document. The display name is highly context sensitive and is only supposed to give the user a good idea of which document this is and whether it has been modified.

properties.name: DocumentID
properties.summary: Gets the document Id. The Id is assigned at construction and never changed. Note: clusters may choose to modify the Id of their internal documents.

properties.name: Enabled
properties.summary: Gets or sets the enabled state for this document. Enabled documents respond to events and display their previews in the Rhino viewport.

properties.name: EnableSolutions
properties.summary: Gets or sets a global variable that indicates whether solutions are allowed to be recomputed. When this flag is off, the solver will be disabled and the event watchers should be silent.

properties.name: EventServer
properties.summary: Gets the event server that belongs to this document. The Event server may be in an inactive state, but it is never null.

properties.name: FilePath
properties.summary: Gets or sets the file path of this document. If the file path is not set Nothing is returned.

properties.name: IgnoredCount
properties.summary: Returns the total numbers of components currently in the Object Exception Ignore List.

properties.name: IsFilePathDefined
properties.summary: Returns True if the filename flag of this document has been set

properties.name: IsModified
properties.summary: Gets or sets the modified flag. If the new value differs from the old value, the ModifiedChanged() event is raised.

properties.name: ModifiedSubsidiaries
properties.summary: Gets the number of modified subsidiary documents.

properties.name: Nested
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether this document is nested. A nested document is always part of some other document and is therefore unknown to the DocumentServer and the Canvas.

properties.name: ObjectCount
properties.summary: Returns the total number of top-level objects in the document.

properties.name: Objects
properties.summary: Returns a list of all normal, top-level objects.

properties.name: ObjectSpan
properties.summary: Gets the total timespan for all objects.

properties.name: Owner
properties.summary: Gets or sets the owner of this document. A document is typically owned when it is subsidiary to some object, such as a cluster.

properties.name: PreviewBoundary
properties.summary: Gets or sets the preview boundary applied to this document. If a boundary has been set, only those objects which are inside the boundary will be previewed.

properties.name: PreviewBoundingBox
properties.summary: Gets the boundingbox used for previews.

properties.name: PreviewColour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the colour of unselected preview geometry.

properties.name: PreviewColourSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the colour of selected preview geometry.

properties.name: PreviewCustomMeshParameters
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Custom Meshing Parameters for this document, these are only used when PreviewMeshType = GH_PreviewMesh.Custom

properties.name: PreviewFilter
properties.summary: Gets or set the preview filter.

properties.name: PreviewMeshType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the preview mesh type for this document.

properties.name: PreviewMode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the preview display mode and makes sure the conduit instance of this class is set to match.

properties.name: Profiler
properties.summary: Gets or sets the profiler mode used in this document.

properties.name: Properties
properties.summary: The properties of this document

properties.name: RaiseEvents
properties.summary: If RaiseEvents is set to false, all the On....() methods of this document will stop raising events.

properties.name: RemotePanelLayout
properties.summary: Gets the Remote Control Panel layout for this document.

properties.name: RuntimeID
properties.summary: Gets the runtime ID of this document. RuntimeID is assigned once and never changed. It is also not deserialized so every document will always have a unique ID when loaded.

properties.name: ScheduleDelay
properties.summary: Gets the delay for the next scheduled solution. If there is no solution scheduled the delay will be negative.

properties.name: SelectedCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of selected objects

properties.name: SelectionTopology
properties.summary: Gets the selection topology of the document.

properties.name: SolutionDepth
properties.summary: Gets the number of nested solutions currently running. If no solutions are running, the depth should be zero. If one solution is runnnig, the depth should be one. Higher depths are only possible if a new solution was scheduled from within an existing solution with delay=0ms.

properties.name: SolutionHistory
properties.summary: Gets a list of the last 1000 solution timespans, from oldest to youngest.

properties.name: SolutionSpan
properties.summary: Gets the timespan for the most recent solution.

properties.name: SolutionState
properties.summary: Gets the state of this document.

properties.name: StateServer
properties.summary: Gets the list of stored states in this document

properties.name: Thumbnail
properties.summary: Gets or sets the thumbnail bitmap for this document.

properties.name: UndoServer
properties.summary: Gets the UndoServer instance that belongs to this document.

properties.name: UndoUtil
properties.summary: Gets a temporary undo utility instance that allows you to easily create standard undo events.

properties.name: ValueTable
properties.summary: Gets the value table associated with this document.

properties.name: IgnoredUnknowns
properties.summary: A collection of missing component IDs to ignore during file load operations. Erase this cache to re-enable all the load warnings.

properties.name: ScheduleInactive
properties.summary: Defined the delay used to indicate the absence of a schedule.

properties.name: ScheduleRecursive
properties.summary: Defines the delay used to indicate the schedule should be immedate and recursive.

events.name: ContextChanged
events.summary: The context for this document was changed.

events.name: DefaultPreviewColourChanged
events.summary: This even is raised whenever the global default for Normal preview colour is changed.

events.name: DefaultSelectedPreviewColourChanged
events.summary: This even is raised whenever the global default for Selected preview colour is changed.

events.name: EnabledChanged
events.summary: The Enabled state was changed on this document.

events.name: EnableSolutionsChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever the Shared EnabledSolutions property is changed.

events.name: FilePathChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever the FilePath of the document is modified.

events.name: ModifiedChanged
events.summary: The modified flag on the document was changed.

events.name: ObjectsAdded
events.summary: Raised after a collection of objects was added to the document.

events.name: ObjectsDeleted
events.summary: Raised after a collection of objects was removed from the document. At this point, the objects still exist, but they no longer belong to this document.

events.name: SettingsChanged
events.summary: Some settings of the document were changed.

events.name: SolutionEnd
events.summary: This event is raised whenever a new solution request has been handled. Even if the document is locked.

events.name: SolutionStart
events.summary: This event is raised whenever a new solution is requested. Even if the document is locked.

events.name: UndoStateChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever there is a change to the document undo/redo stack.
